LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PATRICIA COOK'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 5, 2015 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 12, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition For Approval Of Transfer
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LEA I. HOFFMAN of Hoffman & Grantham, Tel No. (626) 765-6937, appearing telephonically for Petitioner CBC Settlement Funding, LLC;
Petitioner/Payee PATRICIA COOK also present.

RULING - Petitioner delivered a set of the moving papers to the Court prior to the hearing. The Court reviewed those papers, and permitted argument at the hearing. The Court modified its tentative ruling, and ruled as follows: Petitioner CBC Settlement Funding, LLC's Petition For Approval Of Transfer of Structured Settlement Payment Rights (regarding Payee Patricia Cook) is DENIED. The Court finds that Patricia Cook would not be getting enough in exchange for what she would be giving up. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition For Approval Of Transfer
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Continued To Jan-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER PATRICIA COOK'S Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer is continued to January 5, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 12, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
